name: pr-review-agent
description: Local-first Electrobun desktop app for AI-assisted GitHub pull request review drafts.

scripts.start: bun run panda:build && vite build && bun scripts/run-electrobun.ts dev
scripts.dev: bun run panda:build && bun scripts/run-electrobun.ts dev --watch
scripts.dev:hmr: bun run panda:build && concurrently "bun run panda:watch" "bun run hmr" "bun run start"
scripts.build:app: bun run panda:build && vite build && bun scripts/run-electrobun.ts build
scripts.build:canary: bun run panda:build && vite build && bun scripts/run-electrobun.ts build --env=canary
